name: Kindergarten World Religions & Belief — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing through a close look at diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing.

lessons.title: Try it together: diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing through a guided practice with diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing.

resources.title: Academic, comparative social studies pathway
resources.description: Planning reference for this Kindergarten World Religions & Belief pathway.

units.title: Wonder and notice: diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing through a close look at diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing.

activities.title: A close look at diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in diverse beliefs, shared values, and learning about without practicing.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
